title: Dawn of the Light Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: The Dragon Masters need a shining Light Dragon to help summon a star and save the world! 💡

q.en: Who is the Dragon Master of the Light Dragon?

explain.en: Rune is the Dragon Master of Lysa the Light Dragon, and he helps Drake on the quest to stop the sky-shadow.
explain.zh: 鲁恩是光龙莱莎的驯龙师，他协助德雷克执行阻止天幕阴影的任务。

options.en: He is the king of Bracken
He is Deaf and uses sign language
He can fly without a dragon

explain.en: Rune is Deaf. He communicates with sign language and through his bond with his dragon Lysa.
explain.zh: 鲁恩是听障人士，他用手语以及与光龙莱莎之间的羁绊来交流。

q.en: What is the name of the Light Dragon?

explain.en: Lysa is the white Light Dragon whose power is needed to help summon a Star Dragon.
explain.zh: 莱莎是一条白色的光龙，它的力量是召唤星龙所必需的。

q.en: Where does Lysa the Light Dragon live?

explain.en: Rune and Lysa live at a shimmering crystal castle where Drake returns the Star Flute at the end of the adventure.
explain.zh: 鲁恩和莱莎住在一座闪闪发亮的水晶城堡，冒险结尾德雷克把星笛还到了那里。

q.en: Why do the Dragon Masters need a Light Dragon?
q.zh: 驯龙师们为什么需要一条光龙？

options.en: To light up the castle halls
To summon the Star Dragon that can stop the sky-shadow
options.zh: 为了召唤能驱散天幕阴影的星龙

explain.en: A Light Dragon is required to summon a Star Dragon, the only dragon powerful enough to break the Shadow Dragon's sky-shadow.
explain.zh: 召唤星龙需要先有光龙，而星龙是唯一能破除暗影龙天幕阴影的龙。

q.en: What big problem are the Dragon Masters trying to solve in this book?
q.zh: 这本书里驯龙师们想解决的大麻烦是什么？

options.en: Stopping Chaya's sky-shadow from covering the world
options.zh: 阻止查亚的天幕阴影笼罩全世界

explain.en: The cursed Shadow Dragon Chaya is blanketing the sky with shadow, and only a Star Dragon can stop him.
explain.zh: 被诅咒的暗影龙查亚正用阴影遮蔽天空，只有星龙才能阻止它。

q.en: Who travels with Drake to find the Light Dragon?
q.zh: 谁和德雷克一起去找光龙？

explain.en: Griffith sends Drake and Darma (Dragon Master of the Gold Dragon Hema) to find the Light Dragon at dawn.
explain.zh: 格里菲斯派德雷克和达尔马（金龙赫玛的驯龙师）在黎明时出发去寻找光龙。

q.en: What magical object is connected to summoning the Star Dragon?
q.zh: 与召唤星龙相关的魔法物品是什么？

explain.en: Rune and Lysa help Drake and Darma find the Star Flute, which is played to summon the Star Dragon.
explain.zh: 鲁恩和莱莎帮德雷克与达尔马找到了星笛，吹奏它便能召唤星龙。

q.en: What color is Lysa the Light Dragon?
q.zh: 光龙莱莎是什么颜色的？

explain.en: Lysa is described as a white Light Dragon who waits at the crystal castle with Rune.
explain.zh: 莱莎被描述成一条白色的光龙，和鲁恩一起守在水晶城堡。

q.en: How do Rune and Drake 'talk' when Drake does not yet know sign language?
q.zh: 当德雷克还不懂手语时，他和鲁恩是怎么“对话”的？

explain.en: Because Rune is Deaf and Drake does not know enough sign language, the boys use their dragons to communicate.
explain.zh: 因为鲁恩听障而德雷克还不懂手语，两个男孩就借助各自的龙来沟通。
